## Summary

<!-- Describe the user-visible or internal change. -->

## Release impact

Apply exactly one label before merging:

- `release:none` for documentation, tests, CI, refactoring, or chores
- `release:patch` for a backward-compatible fix (`fix:` or `perf:` title)
- `release:minor` for a backward-compatible feature (`feat:` title)
- `release:major` for a breaking change (a `!` before the title colon)
